title: New Guns
body:
# This mod had to be recreated, no updates for a while
Adds  "new" guns to minecraft, add also melee items. We plan on adding much more to the mod soon.
<details>
<summary>Controls</summary>
Right click(Yes, right click), to shoot.
R to reload(Must be completely out of bullets to use. Also, you take 1 pack of bullets to reload the full magazine)
Z to zoom slightly, and you can still move
X to zoom in more.
There is currently no custom animations.


</details>

Please note that this mod is currently not on curseforge, and is a standalone mod. Feel free to make add ons for this mod, although good luck as there is currently no built-in way to do so. Don't expect too much.
Made by SongfulTulip and Kerk1315.
<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>
Made by SongfulTulip and Kerk1315. Made with mcreaotor and Blockbench. We don't claim ownership of any of the sounds used(As how would we get gunshot sounds?). All sounds are from Pixabay.


</details>

Feel free to make a video on this mod
